## GET `/api/resource`

<!-- Brief description of what this endpoint returns. -->

### Authentication

Requires permission: `{ action: "read", subject: "Resource" }`

See [Roles & Permissions](../authorization/roles-permissions.md) for details.

### Query Parameters

| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | Yes | <!-- description --> |

### Response

```json
{
  "data": []
}
```

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `200` | Success |
| `401` | Unauthenticated |
| `403` | Insufficient permissions |
